do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test (test 1): strong identity field entity_type differs (organization vs vendor). The records denote distinct real-world entities despite sharing the base name 'Mercer'.

suggestion.rationale: entity_type is a strong identity field. The first record's payload_identity_fields has entity_type 'organization', the second has 'vendor'. Per Identity Merge Canon test 1, this contradiction forces do_not_merge regardless of name similarity or shared relation context.
